title: Storage Backends
description: OffsetBackingStore implementations across Redis, JDBC, and ConfigMap modules
external_interfaces: org.apache.kafka.connect.storage.OffsetBackingStore [interface] — configure(WorkerConfig), start(), stop(), get(Collection<ByteBuffer>): Future, set(Map<ByteBuffer,ByteBuffer>, Callback): Future, connectorPartitions(String): Set
org.apache.kafka.connect.storage.MemoryOffsetBackingStore [abstract class] — implements OffsetBackingStore; holds Map<ByteBuffer,ByteBuffer> data; overrides start/stop/get/set/save()
org.apache.kafka.connect.storage.FileOffsetBackingStore — Kafka Connect built-in; implements OffsetBackingStore; file-based persistence
org.apache.kafka.connect.storage.KafkaOffsetBackingStore — Kafka Connect built-in; implements OffsetBackingStore; Kafka topic-backed

classes.name: RedisOffsetBackingStore
key_methods: configure(WorkerConfig): void — wraps config into RedisOffsetBackingStoreConfig
load(): void — client.hgetAll(keyName) with Uni retry/backoff; populates data map
save(): void — client.hset(keyName, key, value) per entry with Uni retry/backoff
classes.notes: Inherits in-memory Map<ByteBuffer,ByteBuffer> data from MemoryOffsetBackingStore. Uses Mutiny Uni for async retry logic.

classes.name: RedisOffsetBackingStoreConfig
key_methods: init(Configuration): void — reads PROP_KEY_NAME; calls super.init()

classes.name: RedisCommonConfig
key_methods: RedisCommonConfig(Configuration, String prefix) — subsets config, validates, calls init()

classes.name: RedisConnection
fields: address, dbIndex, user, password: connection params
key_methods: getRedisClient(clientName, waitEnabled, waitTimeout, waitRetry, waitRetryDelay): RedisClient — creates JedisClient or JedisClusterClient; wraps with WaitReplicasRedisClient if waitEnabled

classes.name: RedisClient
methods: hset(byte[] key, byte[] field, byte[] value): long

classes.name: JedisClient
key_methods: All RedisClient methods — delegate to jedis instance

classes.name: JedisClusterClient
key_methods: xadd(List): validates same-slot or falls back sequential

classes.name: WaitReplicasRedisClient
key_methods: WaitReplicasRedisClient(RedisClient, int replicas, long timeout, boolean retry, long delay)
hset/xadd — calls waitResult(supplier) which calls delegate.waitReplicas() after write

classes.name: JdbcOffsetBackingStore
key_methods: set(Map<ByteBuffer,ByteBuffer>, Callback): Future<Void> — updates data + calls save()
save(): void — DELETE all rows, INSERT each entry via RetriableConnection
load(): void — SELECT all rows into data map
initializeTable(): void — checks/creates table via DatabaseMetaData

classes.name: JdbcOffsetBackingStoreConfig
fields: tableCreate, tableSelect, tableDelete, tableInsert: String (formatted SQL)
key_methods: init(Configuration): void — reads table name/DDL/DML fields
getters for tableName, tableCreate, tableSelect, tableDelete, tableInsert

classes.name: RetriableConnection
classes.notes: Wraps JDBC Connection with retry logic; used by JdbcOffsetBackingStore and JdbcSchemaHistory
key_methods: executeWithRetry(ConnectionConsumer, String operation, boolean withCommit): void

important_notes: FileOffsetBackingStore and KafkaOffsetBackingStore are Kafka Connect built-ins (not in this codebase), referenced only as external context
InMemoryOffsetBackingStore = MemoryOffsetBackingStore from Kafka Connect; RedisOffsetBackingStore extends it
RedisOffsetBackingStore uses Redis HSET/HGETALL on a single hash key; key default is 'metadata:debezium:offsets'
WaitReplicasRedisClient is a Decorator that wraps any RedisClient to ensure replica acknowledgment after writes
JdbcOffsetBackingStore uses delete-all + re-insert strategy on each save()
RedisConnection.getInstance(config) is the static factory entry point for creating RedisClient instances
Cluster mode: JedisClusterClient; Standalone: JedisClient optionally wrapped in WaitReplicasRedisClient
